message.mobileAppDescription.message: Use AceData directly on your phone with a downloadable Android APK today, while the iOS package will be published once signing is ready.

message.mobileAndroidHint.message: For Android phones and tablets. Scan the QR code or download the latest APK directly.

message.mobileAndroidPending.message: The Android package is not available yet. Please check back shortly.

message.mobileSecureDelivery.description: Highlights that the package is delivered over a CDN link

message.mobileLatestRelease.description: Explains that the shown version is the current public release

message.mobileSharedAccount.description: Explains that mobile and web use the same account

message.mobileInstallNote.message: For enterprise or Ad Hoc iOS builds, first-time installation may require trusting the certificate in Settings > General > VPN & Device Management.

title.mobileApp.description: Title of the mobile app download page

title.mobileFastAccess.message: Faster access, no app store detour
title.mobileFastAccess.description: Benefit title on the mobile download page highlighting fast access

title.mobileTrustedRelease.description: Benefit title on the mobile download page highlighting managed releases

title.mobileUnifiedExperience.message: A unified experience across web and mobile

nav.mobileApp.description: Navigation entry for the mobile app download page

message.mobileFastAccess.message: Users can scan on their phone to install immediately or download the APK on desktop first and distribute it internally for testing or fast rollout.
message.mobileFastAccess.description: Benefit copy on the mobile download page highlighting fast access

message.mobileTrustedRelease.message: Version, platform state, and installation path stay in one place so your team does not need to chase separate links or outdated build notes.
message.mobileTrustedRelease.description: Benefit copy on the mobile download page highlighting controlled distribution

message.mobileUnifiedExperience.message: The same account, credits, and product entry points work across mobile and web, making it easier to move between devices without extra setup.
message.mobileUnifiedExperience.description: Benefit copy on the mobile download page highlighting a unified account experience
